name: Small Manufacturer Firearms Exemption

eligibility.description: Available to small-scale gunsmiths or boutique manufacturers who stay below the 50-unit aggregate annual threshold.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a total exemption from the 10% or 11% firearms excise tax for entities that manufacture, produce, or import fewer than 50 firearms per year.
